name: insurance-pas-qa-automation
description: Comprehensive QA automation test suite for Insurance Policy Administration System

scripts.test: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-qa-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-qa-report.json --bail --verbose
scripts.test:local: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-local-env.json --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-qa-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-qa-report.json --bail --verbose
scripts.test:prod: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-prod-env.json --folder "00 - Setup" --folder "01 - Quote Lifecycle" --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-prod-report.html --bail
scripts.test:data-driven: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --iteration-data data/test-data.csv --iteration-count 5 --folder "00 - Setup" --folder "01 - Quote Lifecycle" --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-data-driven-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-data-driven-report.json --bail
scripts.test:data-driven:local: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-local-env.json --iteration-data data/test-data.csv --iteration-count 5 --folder "00 - Setup" --folder "01 - Quote Lifecycle" --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-data-driven-local-report.html --bail
scripts.test:verbose: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-qa-report.html --bail --verbose --color on
scripts.test:ci: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v1-stable.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-qa-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-qa-report.json --bail
scripts.setup: npm install -g newman && npm run install-reporters
scripts.test:v2: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v2-complete.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-v2-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-v2-report.json --bail --verbose
scripts.test:v2:data-driven: newman run collections/insurance-enterprise-v2-complete.json --environment collections/insurance-env.json --iteration-data data/test-data-v2.csv --folder "00 - Setup" --folder "01 - Quote Lifecycle" --reporters cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/insurance-v2-data-driven-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/insurance-v2-data-driven-report.json --bail
scripts.test:compare: npm run test -- --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/v1-report.html && npm run test:v2 -- --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/v2-report.html

author: QA Team
